plugin.name: Bilibili Danmaku Monitor
plugin.description: Monitor Bilibili live stream danmaku in real time, filter it, and push it to the AI for analysis and replies
account.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear Bilibili credentials?
account.help_login_body: Scan the QR code with the Bilibili App to log in. Credentials will be encrypted and saved locally after successful login.
account.help_security_body: Manual Cookie entry is no longer provided to avoid accidental leakage of sensitive Cookies during copying.

bgllm.profile_placeholder: Describe the streamer/user's basic profile for LLM context...
bgllm.prompt_template_placeholder:
Custom System Prompt template, leave empty for default.
Example: You are {name}, a cute catgirl streamer.
Knowledge base: {knowledge_context}
Generate guidance based on danmaku.

db.keyword_placeholder: Leave empty for all; enter keyword or user UID

entries.ask_neko_bili_reply.description: Hand the comment intent to NEKO AI to generate a natural reply suitable for Bilibili comments, then auto-send.
entries.ask_neko_bili_reply.name: AI-Assisted Comment
entries.ask_neko_bili_send_dynamic.descr: Hand the dynamic intent to NEKO AI to generate suitable Bilibili dynamic content, then auto-publish.
entries.ask_neko_bili_send_dynamic.name: AI-Assisted Dynamic
entries.ask_neko_bili_send_message.descr: Hand the message intent to NEKO AI to generate polite and natural private message content, then auto-send.
entries.ask_neko_bili_send_message.name: AI-Assisted Message
entries.ask_neko_send_danmaku.descriptio: Hand the danmaku intent to NEKO AI to generate suitable live room danmaku content, then auto-send (requires connected room and login).
entries.ask_neko_send_danmaku.name: AI-Assisted Danmaku
entries.bili_check_credential.descriptio: Check if the current Bilibili login credential is usable.
entries.bili_check_credential.name: Check Bilibili Credential
entries.bili_comments.description: Get comments by video BV number or keyword.
entries.bili_comments.name: Get Video Comments
entries.bili_danmaku.description: Get historical danmaku by video BV number or keyword.
entries.bili_danmaku.name: Get Video Danmaku
entries.bili_favorite_content.descriptio: Get the video list from a specified favorite folder.
entries.bili_favorite_content.name: Get Favorite Content
entries.bili_favorite_lists.description: Get the current user's or specified UID's favorite list.
entries.bili_favorite_lists.name: Get Favorite Lists
entries.bili_hot_buzzwords.name: Get Trending Search Terms
entries.bili_hot_videos.description: Get the list of trending Bilibili videos.
entries.bili_hot_videos.name: Get Hot Videos
entries.bili_list_tools.description: List the Bilibili tool capabilities exposed by the current plugin.
entries.bili_list_tools.name: List Bilibili Tools
entries.bili_login.description: Generate a QR code for Bilibili scan login.
entries.bili_login.name: Generate Login QR Code
entries.bili_login_check.description: Check the current QR code scan login status.
entries.bili_login_check.name: Check Scan Status
entries.bili_rank.name: Get Rankings
entries.bili_reply.description: Post a comment or reply under a Bilibili video. Login required.
entries.bili_reply.name: Post Comment or Reply
entries.bili_search.name: Search Bilibili Videos
entries.bili_send_dynamic.description: Post a Bilibili dynamic. Login required.
entries.bili_send_dynamic.name: Post Dynamic
entries.bili_send_message.description: Send a Bilibili private message to a specified user. Login required.
entries.bili_send_message.name: Send Private Message
entries.bili_subtitle.description: Get subtitles by video BV number or keyword.
entries.bili_subtitle.name: Get Video Subtitles
entries.bili_user_info.description: Get Bilibili user info by UID.
entries.bili_user_info.name: Get User Info
entries.bili_user_videos.description: Get a user's uploaded video list by UID.
entries.bili_user_videos.name: Get User Videos
entries.bili_video_info.description: Get Bilibili video details by bvid or aid.
entries.bili_video_info.name: Get Video Info
entries.bili_weekly_hot.description: Get the Bilibili weekly hot list or specific issue content.
entries.bili_weekly_hot.name: Get Weekly Hot List
entries.clear_credential.description: Clear local Bilibili login credentials and switch to guest mode.
entries.clear_credential.name: Log Out
entries.connect.description: Start listening to the configured live room.
entries.connect.name: Connect
entries.disconnect.description: Stop listening to the live room.
entries.disconnect.name: Disconnect
entries.get_bg_llm_config.description: Read the complete background LLM configuration (including cloud/api_key/model etc.) regardless of enabled status.
entries.get_bg_llm_config.name: Get Background LLM Full Config
entries.get_danmaku.description: Get the latest danmaku, SC, and gifts from the current live room, returned as formatted content for AI understanding and reply.
entries.get_danmaku.name: Get Live Room Danmaku
entries.get_guidance_config.description: Query the current background LLM system configuration, including aggregation window size, sample count, LLM call statistics, etc.
entries.get_guidance_config.name: Get Background LLM Config & Stats
entries.get_live_report.description: Have the neko retrieve a complete intelligence summary of the current live room, including topics, audience, danmaku rhythm, etc.
entries.get_live_report.name: Get Live Report Summary
entries.get_status.description: Get the current status of the danmaku plugin, including room ID, listening state, filter settings, etc.
entries.get_status.name: Get Plugin Status
entries.open_ui.description: Open the Bilibili danmaku plugin Web UI console in a browser for configuring rooms, viewing danmaku, etc.
entries.open_ui.name: Open Danmaku Console
entries.query_audience.description: Have the neko proactively query the background LLM for audience dynamics, trending topics, or danmaku rhythm.
entries.query_audience.name: Query Audience Insights
entries.query_danmaku.description: Query historical danmaku by keyword or user.
entries.query_danmaku.name: Query Danmaku History
entries.query_gifts.description: Query gift records and revenue statistics.
entries.query_gifts.name: Query Gift History
entries.query_interact.description: Query interaction records such as entry and follow.
entries.query_interact.name: Query Interaction Records
entries.query_stats.name: Data Statistics
entries.reload_credential.description: Reload Bilibili credentials from local files or NEKO global config without restarting the plugin.
entries.reload_credential.name: Reload Credential
entries.save_credential.description: Encrypt and save user-provided Bilibili Cookie fields locally. Takes effect after restart.
entries.save_credential.name: Save Bilibili Credential
entries.send_danmaku.description: Send a danmaku message to the current live room.
entries.send_danmaku.name: Send Danmaku
entries.set_danmaku_max_length.descripti: Set the maximum length limit for sent danmaku.
entries.set_danmaku_max_length.name: Set Max Danmaku Length
entries.set_interval.description: How often to push danmaku to AI. Min {min_interval}s, max {max_interval}s.
entries.set_interval.name: Set Push Interval
entries.set_master_bili_account.descript: Set the master's Bilibili UID and username to help NEKO identify which account belongs to the master.
entries.set_master_bili_account.name: Set Master Bilibili Account
entries.set_room_id.description: Switch the Bilibili live room to monitor.
entries.set_room_id.name: Switch Live Room
entries.set_target_lanlan.description: Set the target AI name for danmaku push.
entries.set_target_lanlan.name: Set Target AI
entries.test_guidance.description: Test guidance generation with sample danmaku, or push custom content to test neko reply format.
entries.test_guidance.name: Test Guidance Generation
entries.test_push.description: Test how the push format affects neko replies with specified content.
entries.test_push.name: Test Push Format
entries.update_guidance_config.descripti: Update the background LLM system configuration parameters.
entries.update_guidance_config.name: Update Background LLM Config
